items.title: I had forgotten how well Tyler Kolek played in that Cup Final... and all 3 NY's Vegas games:
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
I had forgotten how well Tyler Kolek played in that Cup Final... and all 3 NY's Vegas games:

🏀 Highest Plus/Minus on the Knicks over their three wins in Vegas:
​Tyler Kolek: +45

New York outscored their opponents by 45 points in the 44 minutes Kolek was on the court.

items.title: We reached the Tyler Kolek, Mo Diawara, Ariel Hukporti and Pacome Dadiet portion of the program with more than half of the fourth quarter left.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
We reached the Tyler Kolek, Mo Diawara, Ariel Hukporti and Pacome Dadiet portion of the program with more than half of the fourth quarter left.

This run is absolutely unbelievable.
